package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_builder_string_len: `len(builder.String())` instead of `builder.Len()`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario649Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
